message.content:
@startuml
actor browser
participant "G_Shield" as GShield #E6E8FA
database grabPay #E6E8FA

== deduction authorization and charge ==
browser ->> GShield : insure
alt [authorization]
    GShield ->> grabPay : deduction authorization
    grabPay ..>> browser : authorization page
    browser ->> grabPay : confirm authorization
    grabPay ..>> browser : authorization result
end
grabPay -->> GShield : authorization result
loop [charge]
    GShield ->> grabPay : silently charge
    grabPay --> GShield : charge result
    GShield -[dotted]-> grabPay : confirm receive
    activate GShield
    note over GShield: underwriting
    deactivate GShield
end
== refund ==
browser ->> GShield : withdrawal
activate GShield
note right of GShield: withdrawal
deactivate GShield
GShield ->> grabPay : cancel authorization
grabPay ..>> GShield : authorization result
GShield ->> grabPay : refund
grabPay ..>> GShield : refund result
GShield .->> browser : withdrawal result
@enduml
